all.en: My friends and I had planned a peaceful picnic in the park for weeks.
all.zh: 我和朋友們已經計畫了好幾週要在公園來場悠閒的野餐。

all.en: We prepared sandwiches, fruit salad, lemonade, and a chocolate cake for dessert.
all.zh: 我們準備了三明治、水果沙拉、檸檬水，以及甜點巧克力蛋糕。

all.en: The weather forecast promised sunshine, so we did not bring umbrellas or raincoats.
all.zh: 氣象預報說會是晴天，所以我們沒有帶傘或雨衣。

all.en: As soon as we spread the blanket on the grass, hundreds of ants appeared.
all.zh: 我們才把野餐墊鋪在草地上，就出現了成百上千的螞蟻。

all.en: We moved to a different spot, but a curious dog ran over and stole a sandwich.
all.zh: 我們換了一個地方，但一隻好奇的狗跑過來，叼走了一個三明治。

all.en: Then, dark clouds suddenly gathered, and the wind started blowing our napkins everywhere.
all.zh: 接著，烏雲突然聚集，風開始把我們的餐巾紙吹得到處都是。

all.en: Within minutes, heavy rain began to pour, soaking our food and clothes completely.
all.zh: 幾分鐘內，傾盆大雨落下，把我們的食物和衣服都淋濕了。

all.en: We ran toward a tree to find shelter, but our chocolate cake fell on the muddy ground.
all.zh: 我們跑向一棵樹下避雨，但巧克力蛋糕卻掉進泥濘的地上。

all.en: My best friend slipped on wet grass and ended up with grass stains on her white dress.
all.zh: 我最要好的朋友在濕草上滑倒，白色洋裝沾滿了草漬。

all.en: Finally, we grabbed our wet bags and ran to a nearby coffee shop for shelter.
all.zh: 最後，我們拎起濕透的袋子，跑到附近的咖啡店避雨。

all.en: We laughed so hard about the disaster that the day ended up being unforgettable anyway.
all.zh: 我們對這場災難笑得不可開交，這一天反而成了難忘的回憶。

all.en: At the coffee shop, the kind owner offered us free hot chocolate and warm towels.
all.zh: 在咖啡店裡，親切的老闆免費招待我們熱巧克力與溫熱的毛巾。

all.en: We dried our hair near a small heater while watching the heavy rain through the window.
all.zh: 我們在小暖爐旁烘乾頭髮，望著窗外傾盆大雨。

all.en: My friend posted a hilarious video of our disaster, which quickly went viral online.
all.zh: 我朋友把這場災難拍成有趣的影片發到網上，很快就爆紅。

all.en: Hundreds of strangers commented with their own funny picnic and camping disaster stories.
all.zh: 上百位陌生人留言分享自己的爆笑野餐與露營災難故事。

all.en: One kind stranger even offered to send us a new picnic blanket through the mail.
all.zh: 甚至有一位善心陌生人主動提出要寄一張新的野餐墊給我們。

all.en: We laughed even harder when we realized our chocolate cake was still safely in the car.
all.zh: 當我們發現巧克力蛋糕其實還安然地放在車裡時，我們笑得更厲害了。

all.en: Two weeks later, we tried again at the same park, this time prepared for any weather.
all.zh: 兩週後，我們在同一個公園再次嘗試，這次為任何天氣都做好了準備。

all.en: We brought a large waterproof tent, bug spray, and even a backup dessert just in case.
all.zh: 我們帶了大型防水帳篷、防蟲噴霧，甚至備了一份備用甜點以防萬一。

all.en: The second picnic went smoothly, but somehow it felt less memorable than the first.
all.zh: 第二次野餐非常順利，但不知為何感覺反而沒第一次令人難忘。

all.en: We agreed that sometimes the disasters we share end up becoming the best stories of all.
all.zh: 我們一致認為，有時候共同經歷的災難，反而成了最棒的故事。

all.en: The following spring, our group started a tradition of one outdoor adventure every single month.
all.zh: 接下來的春天，我們這群人開始了每月一次戶外冒險的傳統。

all.en: Our second adventure took us to a quiet lake where we tried paddleboarding for the first time.
all.zh: 第二次冒險帶我們來到一座寧靜的湖泊，第一次嘗試立槳衝浪。

all.en: My best friend fell into the water within the first five minutes and laughed until she cried.
all.zh: 我最要好的朋友在最初五分鐘內就跌進水裡，笑到流淚。

all.en: This time, the chocolate cake was sealed inside a waterproof container that floated on the lake.
all.zh: 這次，巧克力蛋糕被裝在能漂浮於湖面的防水容器裡。

all.en: We took countless funny photos and added them to our growing scrapbook of disasters.
all.zh: 我們拍了無數張搞笑照片，並加入了不斷擴增的災難剪貼簿。

all.en: By the end of summer, the kind stranger had become a regular member of our small group.
all.zh: 到了夏末，那位善心陌生人已經成為我們小團體的固定成員。

all.en: He brought along his golden retriever, who immediately tried to steal sandwiches from everyone.
all.zh: 他帶著他的黃金獵犬一起來，那隻狗立刻想偷走每個人的三明治。

all.en: We renamed our group chat to a funny title that referenced our very first rainy disaster.
all.zh: 我們把群組改了一個有趣的名字，靈感來自我們最初的那場雨天災難。

all.en: Years later, that single muddy picnic remained the funniest story we ever told new friends.
all.zh: 多年後，那場泥濘的野餐仍是我們向新朋友講述時最爆笑的故事。

all.en: We learned that perfect plans matter less than the people you share each adventure with.
all.zh: 我們體會到，完美的計畫遠不如與你共度每一場冒險的人來得重要。

all.en: Our monthly adventure tradition continued for three more years without missing a single month.
all.zh: 我們每月一次的冒險傳統持續了整整三年，從未錯過任何一個月。

all.en: The kind stranger with the golden retriever eventually became my best friend's serious boyfriend.
all.zh: 那位帶著黃金獵犬的善心陌生人，最後成了我最要好朋友的正式男友。

all.en: They got engaged during a snowy winter picnic that involved frozen sandwiches and lots of laughter.
all.zh: 他們在一場下雪的冬日野餐中訂婚，過程裡有冰凍的三明治與滿滿的歡笑。

all.en: At the wedding ceremony, my best friend wore the exact same dress with old grass stains visible.
all.zh: 在婚禮上，我最要好的朋友穿著當年那件還看得到草漬的洋裝。

all.en: She proudly explained the story behind those stains to every curious wedding guest.
all.zh: 她驕傲地向每一位好奇的婚禮賓客解釋那些草漬背後的故事。

all.en: Their wedding gift to each other was a giant waterproof picnic blanket with their names embroidered.
all.zh: 他們送給彼此的結婚禮物是一條繡有兩人名字的巨型防水野餐墊。

all.en: That same blanket has now traveled with our group to fifteen different parks and lakes.
all.zh: 那條野餐墊如今已跟著我們的團體造訪過十五個不同的公園與湖泊。

all.en: Our group chat name has changed three times, but it always references that first disastrous afternoon.
all.zh: 我們的群組名稱已經換過三次，但每次都還是引用那場初次災難的午後。

all.en: The golden retriever, now older and gentler, still tries to steal sandwiches whenever possible.
all.zh: 那隻黃金獵犬如今年紀大了也溫和許多，但只要有機會仍會偷三明治。

all.en: Every new friend we meet eventually asks to join one of our famous monthly disaster adventures.
all.zh: 我們認識的每位新朋友最後都會要求加入我們著名的每月災難冒險。
